This '''gang''' operated on the planet [[Diado]] under the leadership of [[Birok]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It consisted of five members: Birok, a [[Unidentified criminal (Devaronian)|Devaronian]], and [[Unidentified criminal (red jacket)|three]] [[Unidentified criminal (striped helmet)|Humanoid]] [[Unidentified criminal (green coat)|males]]. One was choked to [[Death/Legends|death]] and the others were shot by [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]].

==Appearances==
